mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO eeg_sessions
user_id, device_type, status, measured_at, created_at
#{userId}, #{deviceType}, #{status},
#{measuredAt}, NOW(),
NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT eeg_session_id AS eegSessionId, user_id AS userId, device_type AS deviceType, status, measured_at AS measuredAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM eeg_sessions WHERE eeg_session_id = #{eegSessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eeg_raw_chunks ( eeg_session_id, chunk_index, sample_rate_hz, start_offset_ms, chunk_sample_count, samples_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eegSessionId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{sampleRateHz}, #{startOffsetMs}, #{chunkSampleCount}, #{samplesJson}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT eeg_raw_chunk_id AS eegRawChunkId, eeg_session_id AS eegSessionId, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, sample_rate_hz AS sampleRateHz, start_offset_ms AS startOffsetMs, chunk_sample_count AS chunkSampleCount, samples_json AS samplesJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM eeg_raw_chunks WHERE eeg_session_id = #{eegSessionId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO eeg_results ( eeg_session_id, delta, theta, alpha, beta, gamma, dominant_band, state_key, state_label, confidence, quality_score, feature_source, focus_score, relax_score, stress_score, mental_workload_score, fatigue_risk_score, cortical_arousal_score, analysis_version, raw_ai_response_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{eegSessionId}, #{delta}, #{theta}, #{alpha}, #{beta}, #{gamma}, #{dominantBand}, #{stateKey}, #{stateLabel}, #{confidence}, #{qualityScore}, #{featureSource}, #{focusScore}, #{relaxScore}, #{stressScore}, #{mentalWorkloadScore}, #{fatigueRiskScore}, #{corticalArousalScore}, #{analysisVersion}, #{rawAiResponseJson}, NOW() )
